use_cases: Form submission triggers for user actions like saving data or confirming choices
Navigation actions between pages or application sections
Toggling UI states such as opening modals or expanding dropdowns
Performing CRUD operations like create, edit, delete in data interfaces
Interactive call-to-action elements throughout React-based applications
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with React, Radix UI Slot for composition, and class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Includes accessible focus-visible states and disabled states with smooth hover transitions. Designed as a foundational UI element for any web application requiring interactive controls.
